query:
SELECT e.id, e.name, e.isOpen, e.manuallyClosed, bh.dayOfWeek, bh.isActive, bh.openTime, bh.closeTime 
FROM establishments e 
LEFT JOIN businessHours bh ON e.id = bh.establishmentId 
WHERE e.id = 60018 
ORDER BY bh.dayOfWeek;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 35dchGD4KrPJFby.860a56c722bc --database enmWmXpAt34diouyKU4TE2 --execute SELECT e.id, e.name, e.isOpen, e.manuallyClosed, bh.dayOfWeek, bh.isActive, bh.openTime, bh.closeTime 
FROM establishments e 
LEFT JOIN businessHours bh ON e.id = bh.establishmentId 
WHERE e.id = 60018 
ORDER BY bh.dayOfWeek;
